macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Open Lower with Major Indices Dipping
items.summary: U.S. stocks opened lower as the S&P 500 fell 0.18%, Nasdaq Composite declined 0.3%, and Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped 0.2%, amid investor caution on economic data, earnings, and geopolitics. Treasury yields and US Dollar Index movements added pressure on equities.

items.title: Fed Leadership Transition: Powell Out, Warsh In
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's term as Chair ends May 15, with Kevin Warsh nominated as successor, raising uncertainty over policy shifts amid political hurdles and key data like NFP and CPI. Markets brace for volatility in rates, currencies, and equities during the transition.

items.title: Markets Lower Amid Iran Strait of Hormuz Deadline Tensions
items.summary: US equity futures declined due to anxiety over President Trump's deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with European inflation confirming energy price impacts from conflict. March labor data supports Fed holding rates near-term.

items.title: US Stock Market Crashes on Iran Tensions and Oil Surge
items.summary: Dow Jones fell 181 points, S&P 500 dropped 45 points (0.68%), and Nasdaq plunged amid rising Iran tensions and surging oil prices shaking Wall Street.

items.title: Q4 2025 S&P 500 Earnings Beat Expectations
items.summary: S&P 500 Q4 2025 earnings grew 13.5% year-on-year with 9% revenue growth, exceeding consensus, broadening beyond mega-cap tech to median companies and small caps, supported by US growth and weaker dollar.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Liquidations Surge to $169.8M in 24 Hours Amid Market Turbulence
items.summary: Global cryptocurrency markets saw $169.8 million in futures liquidations over the past 24 hours, primarily affecting Bitcoin and Ethereum positions with a skew toward shorts. This event highlights heightened volatility and shifting trader sentiment amid macroeconomic and regulatory pressures.

items.title: Citadel Securities and Blockchain Association Clash with SEC Over Tokenized Stocks Control
items.summary: Citadel Securities and the Blockchain Association are battling the SEC on whether tokenization of stocks will modernize market infrastructure under Wall Street control or enable decentralized blockchain access. SEC officials indicate ongoing work on exemptions for tokenized securities trading.

items.title: Top Crypto Gainers: XION Surges 59%, NOM Gains 48% in Volatile 24-Hour Session
items.summary: XION led gainers with a 59.09% rise to $0.1572, followed by NOM at 48.40% to $0.0067, amid significant trading volumes indicating strong market interest. Other notable movers include EDGE up 24.72% and F token with 12.65% gains.

items.title: Major Crypto Losers: PCI Drops 19.67%, DEGO Falls 17.68% Amid Regulatory Headwinds
items.summary: PCI suffered the largest decline at 19.67% to $0.0491, linked to regulatory pressures on payment infrastructure tokens, while DEGO dropped 17.68% reflecting DeFi and NFT sector contraction. Market cap dipped slightly with BTC dominance stable.

items.title: Bitcoin Rainbow Chart Indicates Price Ranging Above $60,000 for Key Reasons
items.summary: Analysis of the Bitcoin Rainbow Chart suggests BTC's position above $60,000 reflects sustained bullish indicators and market dynamics. This comes amid broader market consolidation and selective altcoin rallies.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Yoshihisa Kishimoto, Creator of Double Dragon and Kunio-kun, Dies at 64
items.summary: Japanese video game designer Yoshihisa Kishimoto, known for creating the Double Dragon and Kunio-kun franchises, passed away on April 2, 2026. His death was confirmed by his son and reported by Famitsu.[7]

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Confirms June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup
items.summary: Microsoft has unveiled the full list of games arriving on Xbox Game Pass in the first wave of June 2025, ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase.[1]

items.title: No More Heroes Developer Announces New Ultraviolent Sci-Fi Game
items.summary: Suda51 and Grasshopper Manufacture revealed a new over-the-top action game blending No More Heroes and Dead Rising elements.[1]

items.title: Helldivers 2 Reveals ‘Force of Law’ Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 announced a new Force of Law Warbond, allowing players to access fresh content in the cooperative shooter.[1]

items.title: Ex-Call of Duty and XDefiant Producer Steps Away from Gaming
items.summary: The executive producer of XDefiant, which shut down after one year, announced he is leaving the gaming industry permanently.[1]

items.title: Sony Reveals New Unexpected PlayStation Controller
items.summary: During the latest PlayStation State of Play, Sony unveiled a new controller featuring an unexpected design.[1]

items.title: Classic Stealth Franchise Returns in VR
items.summary: Maze Theory and Vertigo Games announced a VR adaptation of a dormant stealth franchise during Sony’s State of Play.[1]

items.title: Arc System Works Unveils Marvel Fighting Game
items.summary: A new 4v4 fighting game featuring Marvel characters and tag battles was revealed by Arc System Works and Sony.[1]

items.title: Nintendo Releases Update for Original Switch Ahead of Switch 2 Launch
items.summary: Nintendo issued system update 20.1.1 for the original Switch, fixing issues just before the Switch 2 launches on June 5.[3]

items.title: Xbox Schedules Summer Showcase and Gears of War: E-Day Direct for June 7
items.summary: Xbox announced its summer gaming showcase along with a dedicated Gears of War: E-Day Direct on June 7.[4]

items.title: Steam Workshop Redesign Improves Mod Browsing
items.summary: Steam updated its Workshop with faster loading, better mobile and Steam Deck support for its 50 million mods.[8]

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
